name: Injected-payload/methodology contract decision -- H-PAYLOAD-CONTRACT (NDEBT-008 + NDEBT-004)

design_notes.what_this_feature_is: Phase-006 F-051: implement the operator's H-PAYLOAD-CONTRACT decision -- methodology/ and ecosystem/ join the bootstrap-injected payload, resolving NDEBT-008 (consumer .nizam/ installs previously omitted them, so the many tools/skill.json + tools/SKILL.md cross-references into methodology/ and the ecosystem/ references added in F-040 dangled). Coupled change across 7 files: bootstrap.sh (REQUIRED_MODULE_DIRS + injected_module_paths + REQUIRED_RELATIVE_FILES + header/--help); standard/GIP.md (0.4.0, the authoritative payload contract, Sections 1/2.2/2.1/4.3/5.1) + CONTEXT.md (0.7.0); tools/validate.sh (build_payload_md_set now sweeps methodology/+ecosystem/; C4/C9/C13 payload carve-outs narrow to {registry, docs}); tools/e2e_bootstrap_test.sh (enlarged-payload assertions); docs/planning/DEBT.md (0.21.0). registry/ and docs/ stay framework-envelope and are never injected.
design_notes.gate_decision: H-PAYLOAD-CONTRACT was DECIDED by the operator on 2026-07-19 ('The methodology/ (and now ecosystem/) shall join the bootstrap-injected payload'), recorded as an operator_gate_decision event BEFORE this execution per the NDEBT-018 rule, and RATIFIED twice over: by the operator's merge of PR #29 (which the F-050 NDEBT-004 caveat named as the ratification event) and by the operator's explicit 'Feature 051 now (payload injection)' answer at this feature's start. The gate is satisfied; F-051 is its implementation, not its decision.
design_notes.enumeration_completeness: NDEBT-005-class discipline applied: the initial single-line grep found 3 GIP payload enumerations, but a full read of GIP.md caught 3 MORE authoritative enumerations it missed (Section 2 point 2 -- the canonical definition, spanning two lines; Section 4 point 3 drift-detection; Section 5.1's payload parenthetical). All six GIP sites plus CONTEXT.md were updated consistently; C10 (single-source-of-truth) confirms GIP internal consistency (E06).
design_notes.process_honesty: Single-session execution, roles collapsed (046-050 precedent, disclosed at phase activation): contract, implementation, verification, and QA authored and executed in-session; all 12 entries ran live with captured evidence (fail-fast commands, NDEBT-019 lesson); scratch probes used only session-scratchpad paths and bootstrap-injected scratch payloads (NDEBT-013/020 probe-isolation), never a real repository path.
design_notes.vacuity_guards: E01 anchors anti-vacuity to the F-050 merge base (91f655d): methodology/ecosystem not injected, carve-outs intact, GIP 0.3.1 there. E05 proves the injection is LOAD-BEARING both ways -- the enlarged payload passes --payload from both invocation forms, and a payload STRIPPED of methodology/+ecosystem/ FAILs BOTH validate.sh (C4/C9/C13 require them) AND bootstrap --verify-only. E12 proves registry/+docs/ genuinely stay out (absent from a real payload, which still passes). E10 proves default mode is unchanged (carve-out is payload-only).

files_modify.purpose: Inject methodology/ + ecosystem/: add both to REQUIRED_MODULE_DIRS and the index-verification injected_module_paths; add methodology/00_planning.md + ecosystem/README.md to REQUIRED_RELATIVE_FILES; update the header + --help payload enumerations and the check_nizam_index comment.

0.4.0: the authoritative payload contract now names the six-directory payload in Section 1 (Core Directive), Section 2 point 2 (canonical definition), Section 2.1, Section 4 point 3 (drift), and Section 5.1; registry/+docs/ explicitly remain non-injected.
0.7.0: the bootstrap sentence now names the six injected directories plus NIZAM.json.

build_payload_md_set sweeps methodology/+ecosystem/ .md in payload mode; the C4 skipped_dirs, C9 injected-prefix allow-list, and C13 SKIPPED_DIR_PREFIXES carve-outs narrow to {registry, docs} (the F-049/F-050 interim methodology/ecosystem carve-outs retire -- those paths now required to resolve in a consumer payload).
assert_payload_present checks all six dirs; the index-validation injected_module_paths requires methodology/+ecosystem/ to resolve; the success message names the six dirs.
[Unreleased] Changed entry: bootstrap payload enlarged to six directories (NDEBT-008).
0.21.0: NDEBT-008 -> Resolved; NDEBT-004 caveat -> ratified (the operator's PR #29 merge ratified the F-050 scope-attribution).

non_goals: registry/ and docs/ are NOT injected -- they remain framework-envelope; the C4/C9/C13 carve-outs retain exactly those two prefixes, and E12 proves a real payload omits them and still passes.
No change to default/--target CWD-anchoring or to the default-mode sweep's no-carve-out behavior (E10); only --payload's required-set is enlarged.

No edit to tools/skill.json or NIZAM.json content (their methodology/+ecosystem/ references were already correct; F-051 makes the payload carry their targets), and no edit to any .agent/evidence/* historical capture.
No consumer-repository migration performed here; existing consumers pick up the enlarged payload on their next re-bootstrap (GIP Section 4 remediation).

verification.acceptance_test: ANTI-VACUITY (HEAD~1 = 91f655d, the F-050 merge base): before this deliverable bootstrap did NOT inject methodology/ecosystem, the carve-outs still listed them, and GIP/CONTEXT named the four-dir payload.
verification.command:
set -e
git show HEAD~1:bootstrap.sh | grep -Fq "readonly REQUIRED_MODULE_DIRS=("
if git show HEAD~1:bootstrap.sh | grep -Ezoq "REQUIRED_MODULE_DIRS=\(\s*\n\s*\"standard\"\s*\n\s*\"templates\"\s*\n\s*\"schema\"\s*\n\s*\"tools\"\s*\n\s*\"methodology\""; then echo "VACUITY: methodology already injected at HEAD~1"; exit 1; fi
git show HEAD~1:tools/validate.sh | grep -Fq "skipped_dirs = {\"methodology\", \"registry\", \"docs\", \"ecosystem\"}"
git show HEAD~1:standard/GIP.md | grep -Fq "version: 0.3.1"
echo "E01 PASS: methodology/ecosystem not injected, carve-outs intact, GIP 0.3.1 at HEAD~1 (anti-vacuity)"

verification.acceptance_test: BOOTSTRAP INJECTS THE ENLARGED SET: REQUIRED_MODULE_DIRS and the index-verification injected_module_paths both include methodology and ecosystem.
verification.command:
set -e
grep -Fq "\"methodology\"" bootstrap.sh && grep -Fq "\"ecosystem\"" bootstrap.sh
grep -Fq "injected_module_paths = {\"standard\", \"templates\", \"schema\", \"tools\", \"methodology\", \"ecosystem\"}" bootstrap.sh
echo "E02 PASS: bootstrap REQUIRED_MODULE_DIRS + injected_module_paths include methodology + ecosystem"
out=$(bash tools/validate.sh 2>&1); rc=$?; printf "%s\n" "$out" | tail -1; test $rc -eq 0 && printf "%s\n" "$out" | tail -1 | grep -Fxq "SUMMARY: 13 passed, 0 failed" && echo "E03 PASS (rc=$rc)"

verification.acceptance_test: PAYLOAD SWEEP GREEN 11/11 from the framework root, EXIT ASSERTED: the enlarged payload-doc set (methodology/+ecosystem/ .md now swept) still passes.
verification.command: out=$(bash tools/validate.sh --payload 2>&1); rc=$?; printf "%s\n" "$out" | tail -1; test $rc -eq 0 && printf "%s\n" "$out" | tail -1 | grep -Fxq "SUMMARY (payload mode): 11 passed, 0 failed" && echo "E04 PASS (rc=$rc)"

verification.acceptance_test: ENLARGED PAYLOAD IS LOAD-BEARING (headline): a real bootstrap injects all six dirs and passes --payload both forms (11/11); a payload MISSING methodology/+ecosystem/ FAILs BOTH validate.sh (C4/C9/C13) AND bootstrap --verify-only.
verification.command:
set -e
S="'"$SB"'/e05"; rm -rf "$S"; mkdir -p "$S"; TAG="f051e05-$$"
git -c user.name=c -c user.email=c@n.local tag -a "$TAG" -m c HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1
T="$S/.nizam"; bash bootstrap.sh --repo-url "file://$(pwd)" --tag "$TAG" --target "$T" >/dev/null 2>&1
for d in standard templates schema tools methodology ecosystem; do test -d "$T/$d"; done
cp tools/validate.sh "$T/tools/validate.sh"
( cd "$T" && bash tools/validate.sh --payload >/dev/null 2>&1 ); a=$?
( cd "$S" && bash .nizam/tools/validate.sh --payload >/dev/null 2>&1 ); b=$?
test $a -eq 0 && test $b -eq 0
rm -rf "$T/methodology" "$T/ecosystem"
set +e
( cd "$T" && bash tools/validate.sh --payload >/dev/null 2>&1 ); c=$?
( bash bootstrap.sh --verify-only --tag "$TAG" --target "$T" >/dev/null 2>&1 ); v=$?
set -e
test $c -ne 0 && test $v -ne 0
git tag -d "$TAG" >/dev/null 2>&1; rm -rf "$S"
echo "E05 PASS: 6 dirs injected; --payload A=$a B=$b (green); stripped payload validate=$c verify-only=$v (both FAIL) -- injection load-bearing"

verification.acceptance_test: GIP AUTHORITATIVE CONTRACT (0.4.0) names the six-dir payload consistently across Sections 1, 2 point 2, 2.1, 4 point 3, and 5.1; CONTEXT.md (0.7.0) names six dirs; both C10-consistent.
verification.command:
set -e
grep -Fq "version: 0.4.0" standard/GIP.md
test "$(grep -c "methodology/\`, \`ecosystem/" standard/GIP.md)" -ge 3
grep -Fq "version: 0.7.0" CONTEXT.md
grep -Fq "six governance directories" CONTEXT.md
out=$(bash tools/validate.sh --target standard/GIP.md 2>&1); printf "%s\n" "$out" | grep -Fq "[C10] PASS"
echo "E06 PASS: GIP 0.4.0 six-dir payload (>=3 enumerations updated) + CONTEXT 0.7.0 six dirs; C10 consistent"

verification.acceptance_test: CARVE-OUTS NARROWED to {registry, docs}: C4 skipped_dirs, C9 injected-prefix allow-list (now includes methodology/ecosystem), and C13 SKIPPED_DIR_PREFIXES all reflect the injection.
verification.command:
set -e
grep -Fq "skipped_dirs = {\"registry\", \"docs\"}" tools/validate.sh
grep -Fq "standard/*|templates/*|schema/*|tools/*|methodology/*|ecosystem/*" tools/validate.sh
grep -Fq "SKIPPED_DIR_PREFIXES = (\"registry/\", \"docs/\")" tools/validate.sh
echo "E07 PASS: C4/C9/C13 carve-outs narrowed to {registry, docs}; methodology/ecosystem now required in payload"

verification.acceptance_test: E2E HARNESS GREEN with the enlarged-payload assertions (assert_payload_present checks 6 dirs; index-validation resolves methodology/ecosystem), EXIT ASSERTED.
verification.command: out=$(bash tools/e2e_bootstrap_test.sh 2>&1); rc=$?; printf "%s\n" "$out" | grep -F "assert_payload_validate_cwd_independent: OK"; printf "%s\n" "$out" | tail -1; test $rc -eq 0 && echo "E08 PASS (rc=$rc)"

verification.acceptance_test: DOCS/DEBT SYNCED: CHANGELOG carries the six-directory Changed entry; DEBT 0.21.0 has NDEBT-008 in Resolved and NDEBT-004 ratified.
verification.command:
set -e
sed -n "/## \[Unreleased\]/,/## \[0.7.0\]/p" CHANGELOG.md | grep -Fq "Bootstrap payload enlarged to six directories"
grep -Fq "version: 0.21.0" docs/planning/DEBT.md
python3 - <<PY
import re
sect=None
for l in open("docs/planning/DEBT.md"):
    if l.startswith("## Open"): sect="open"
    elif l.startswith("## Resolved"): sect="resolved"
    if l.startswith("| NDEBT-008 "): assert sect=="resolved", "NDEBT-008 not Resolved"
    if l.startswith("| NDEBT-004 "): assert "RATIFIED by" in l, "NDEBT-004 not ratified"
print("ok")
PY
echo "E09 PASS: CHANGELOG six-dir entry; DEBT 0.21.0; NDEBT-008 Resolved; NDEBT-004 ratified"

verification.acceptance_test: DEFAULT/TARGET UNCHANGED: default mode applies NO payload carve-out (all refs required); --target on a single md still exits 0.
verification.command:
set -e
awk "/if mode == .payload.:/{p=1} p&&/skipped_dirs = /{print; exit}" tools/validate.sh | grep -Fq "{\"registry\", \"docs\"}"
out=$(bash tools/validate.sh --target standard/GIP.md 2>&1); rc=$?; test $rc -eq 0
echo "E10 PASS: carve-out is payload-mode-only (default requires all refs); --target rc=$rc"

verification.acceptance_test: DELIVERABLE CONFINEMENT: HEAD~1..HEAD touches exactly the seven contracted files and no tracked .agent path.
verification.command:
set -e
test "$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1..HEAD | LC_ALL=C sort | tr "\n" " ")" = "CHANGELOG.md CONTEXT.md bootstrap.sh docs/planning/DEBT.md standard/GIP.md tools/e2e_bootstrap_test.sh tools/validate.sh "
test -z "$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1..HEAD -- .agent/)"
echo "E11 PASS: confined to the seven contracted files, no .agent path"

verification.acceptance_test: REGISTRY/DOCS STAY NON-INJECTED: a real bootstrap payload does NOT contain registry/ or docs/, and still passes --payload (they remain framework-envelope).
verification.command:
set -e
S="'"$SB"'/e12"; rm -rf "$S"; mkdir -p "$S"; TAG="f051e12-$$"
git -c user.name=c -c user.email=c@n.local tag -a "$TAG" -m c HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1
T="$S/.nizam"; bash bootstrap.sh --repo-url "file://$(pwd)" --tag "$TAG" --target "$T" >/dev/null 2>&1
test ! -d "$T/registry" && test ! -d "$T/docs"
cp tools/validate.sh "$T/tools/validate.sh"
( cd "$T" && bash tools/validate.sh --payload >/dev/null 2>&1 ); a=$?
test $a -eq 0
git tag -d "$TAG" >/dev/null 2>&1; rm -rf "$S"
echo "E12 PASS: registry/ and docs/ absent from payload; --payload still green (rc=$a) -- they stay framework-envelope"

evidence_convention: Each verification command's captured output is in .agent/evidence/051-verify-NN.txt (12 entries), plus the consolidated .agent/evidence/051/verification.txt (12 EXIT:0 markers) and .agent/evidence/051/diff.patch (the deliverable diff). Commands run from the repo root at deliverable commit 68832c9 (HEAD), with HEAD~1 = the F-050 merge base 91f655d as the anti-vacuity anchor; scratch entries (E05/E12) use a session-scratch root and bootstrap-injected scratch payloads exclusively.

approvals.process_note: Operator-directed phase execution; H-PAYLOAD-CONTRACT gate decided + ratified (see design_notes.gate_decision). No separate Loop-1 gate agents; the 12-entry suite executed live with captured evidence; QA record .agent/qa/051.json documents the independent full re-run.
